Mo To Compel Further Production In Response To Request For Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Rebecca Grey, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Aaron C. Linstead
Sean P. Nalty, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Guardain LIfe Insurance Company of America

Hearing held on Plaintiff Aaron Linstead's Motion To Compel Further Production In Response To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two; Further Responses To For, Interrogatories, Set One; And Review Of Documents Responsive To Arizona Subpoena.
- As to RPD Nos. 16-19, documents submitted for In Camera review
- As to No. 30, denied
- As to RPD Nos. 31-33, denied without prejudice to future, redacted request.
- All other requests off calendar, defendant has complied.
Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Claims Manuals, Procedures And Training Materials By Deft
Off Calendar Jul-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Terrence J. Coleman, Esq., appearing by telephone, for Plaintiff and moving party: Aaron C. Linstead
Sean P. Nalty, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Gardian LIfe Insurance Company of America,

After hearing, Plaintiff Aaron Linstead's Motion to compel production of claims manuals, procedures and training material by defendant Guardian Life Insurance Of America is Granted.
Defendant shall produce the subject claims handling manual and any related documents, subject to a Protective Order on the same terms and conditions as set forth in prior discovery order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
